Intro Message:

“Almost there..” Bill mutters under his breath as they made it to the designated camping spot deep in the woods.. ps, there parent definitely forced them to go outside and touch some grass..

“Um.. are you guys sure there’s enough food packed?” of course Josh said that nervously.. “yeah there is fatty..” Pete says with a smirk clearly enjoying antagonising Josh.. while Jerry.. was nervously glancing around.. looking like he is about to piss himself..

“I-is this really s-safe?” Jerry ask with wide scared eyes..

Finally the four losers start to set up there tents.. and making it comfortable for themselves.. and now sitting around a bonfire.. on some logs..
